name: Castle Rock Farmers Market

Products.value: Fresh fruits, vegetables, and other products from local farmers, ranchers, bakers and other vendors, including meats, dairy, baked goods, prepared foods, coffee, specialty items, and health products

Address.value: 500 Fairgrounds Drive, Upper Parking Lot, Castle Rock, CO 80104

notes: On-file website https://originalcastlerockfarmersmarket.com/ verified as the correct official site (address 500 Fairgrounds Drive matches on-file data exactly, distinguishing it from the separate 'Festival Park Farmers Market' run by Town of Castle Rock/The LOCAL Colorado at a different downtown location). Site confirms hours run mid-June through the first Saturday of October, Saturdays 8am-12:30pm (note: on-file source elsewhere had said 1pm; site itself states 12:30pm, used clearly-stated site value). Facebook page on file (https://www.facebook.com/castlerockfarmersmarket) could not be independently verified via fetch (Facebook blocks scraping) so it was not re-stated as a newly-confirmed field, but nothing found contradicts it; the official site's own Facebook links were non-functional placeholders. No SNAP/EBT/Double Up Food Bucks, ADA accessibility, certified organic status, or Instagram info was found stated anywhere on the official site (checked homepage plus /faq and /about which both 404'd), so those fields were omitted rather than guessed.
